info.name: Government Complaints API
info.description: Postman collection for the currently implemented GCMS API routes: authentication, OTP verification, profile, logout, role ping checks, lookups, admin management, and citizen complaint tracking.

item.name: Auth - Citizen Register Flow
item.description: Registers a public citizen, verifies the register OTP, reads the profile, and logs out.

exec: console.log('No OTP returned. Confirm APP_ENV=local or copy OTP manually.');

request.description: Registers a new citizen account. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 201 with success=true, data.user_id, requires_otp=true, and data.otp only when APP_ENV=local. Saves citizen_user_id and citizen_otp when available.

Verifies the OTP generated during citizen registration. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with success=true, token_type=Bearer, token, and user.role=citizen. Saves citizen_token.
Returns the authenticated citizen profile after registration. Required role: authenticated user. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 200 with current user details.

exec: console.log('Citizen current access token was revoked.');

request.description: Logs out the current citizen session by deleting the current Sanctum token. Required role: authenticated user. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 200 with success=true.

item.name: Auth - Citizen Login Flow
item.description: Logs in the registered citizen, verifies login OTP, and reads the profile.

exec: console.log('No login OTP returned. Confirm APP_ENV=local or copy OTP manually.');

request.description: Starts citizen login using email and password. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with data.user_id and requires_otp=true. Saves citizen_user_id and login_otp when available.
Verifies the citizen login OTP. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with token and token_type=Bearer. Saves citizen_token.
Returns the authenticated citizen profile after login. Required role: authenticated user. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 200 with user.role=citizen.

item.name: Auth - Admin Login Flow
item.description: Logs in the seeded admin, verifies OTP, reads profile, and checks admin ping.

exec: console.log('No admin OTP returned. Confirm APP_ENV=local or copy OTP manually.');

request.description: Starts login for the seeded admin account. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with user_id and OTP only in local. Saves admin_user_id and admin_otp when available.
Verifies the admin login OTP. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with token and user.role=admin. Saves admin_token.
Returns the authenticated admin profile. Required role: authenticated user. Required token: admin_token. Expected response: 200 with user.role=admin.
Verifies admin RBAC access. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Expected response: 200 with data.role=admin.

item.name: Auth - Employee Login Flow
item.description: Logs in the seeded employee, verifies OTP, reads profile, and checks employee ping.

exec: console.log('No employee OTP returned. Confirm APP_ENV=local or copy OTP manually.');

request.description: Starts login for the seeded employee account. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with user_id and OTP only in local. Saves employee_user_id and employee_otp when available.
Verifies the employee login OTP. Required role: public. Required token: none. Expected response: 200 with token and user.role=employee. Saves employee_token.
Returns the authenticated employee profile. Required role: authenticated user. Required token: employee_token. Expected response: 200 with user.role=employee.
Verifies employee RBAC access. Required role: employee. Required token: employee_token. Expected response: 200 with data.role=employee.

item.name: RBAC Tests
item.description: Role-based access checks using saved citizen, employee, and admin tokens.

request.description: Checks citizen role access. Required role: citizen. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 200 with data.role=citizen.
Checks employee role access. Required role: employee. Required token: employee_token. Expected response: 200 with data.role=employee.
Checks admin role access. Required role: admin. Required token: admin_token. Expected response: 200 with data.role=admin.

item.name: Admin Ping With Citizen Token Should Be Forbidden

request.description: Negative RBAC check. Required role: admin. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 403 with success=false.

item.name: Lookups
item.description: Public lookup endpoints for frontend dropdowns and static complaint statuses. No token required.

request.description: Fetches active departments. Required role: public. Expected response: success=true and data.departments array.
Fetches active complaint categories with department data. Required role: public. Expected response: success=true and data.categories array.
Fetches active categories filtered by department_id. Required role: public. Set department_id first from admin create/list response.
Fetches priorities for frontend selection. Required role: public. Expected response: success=true and data.priorities array.
Fetches static complaint lifecycle status values. Required role: public. Expected response: success=true and data.statuses array.

item.name: Admin - Departments
item.description: Admin-only CRUD for departments. Requires admin_token.

request.description: Lists departments with pagination. Required role: admin. Expected response: data.departments and pagination meta.
Creates a department. Required role: admin. Saves department_id and department_code.
Shows one department. Required role: admin. Requires department_id.
Updates one department. Required role: admin. Requires department_id.
Soft deletes one department. Required role: admin. Requires department_id. Resets department variables to seeded Municipality after success.

item.name: Admin - Categories
item.description: Admin-only CRUD for complaint categories. Requires admin_token and a department_id for create.

request.description: Lists categories with department data and pagination. Required role: admin.
Creates a complaint category. Required role: admin. Requires department_id. Saves category_id and category_code.
Shows one category with department data. Required role: admin. Requires category_id.
Updates one category. Required role: admin. Requires category_id.
Soft deletes one category. Required role: admin. Requires category_id. Resets category variables to seeded Road Damage after success.

item.name: Admin - Priorities
item.description: Admin-only CRUD for priorities. Requires admin_token.

request.description: Lists priorities with pagination. Required role: admin.
Creates a priority. Required role: admin. Saves priority_id.
Shows one priority. Required role: admin. Requires priority_id.
Updates one priority. Required role: admin. Requires priority_id.
Soft deletes one priority. Required role: admin. Requires priority_id. Resets priority_id to seeded Low after success.

item.name: Admin - SLA Rules
item.description: Admin-only CRUD for SLA rules. Requires admin_token, priority_id, and optionally department_id/category_id.

request.description: Lists SLA rules with department, category, and priority relationships. Required role: admin.
Creates an SLA rule. Required role: admin. Requires priority_id; department_id and category_id can be null but are supplied here after creating records. Saves sla_rule_id.
Shows one SLA rule with relationships. Required role: admin. Requires sla_rule_id.
Updates one SLA rule. Required role: admin. Requires sla_rule_id.
Soft deletes one SLA rule. Required role: admin. Requires sla_rule_id.

item.name: Citizen - Complaints
item.description: Citizen-only complaint creation and tracking. Requires citizen_token. Employee processing, admin assignment, notifications, offline sync, and classification are intentionally out of scope for this folder.

request.description: Lists only the authenticated citizen complaints. Optional filters: status, department_id, category_id, priority_id, date_from, date_to, search, per_page.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Street light is broken",
  "description": "The street light near my house has been broken for three days.",
  "department_id": "{{department_id}}",
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "priority_id": "{{priority_id}}",
  "latitude": 33.5138,
  "longitude": 36.2765,
  "address": "Damascus",
  "source": "web"
}

request.description: Creates a complaint from JSON. If category_id is set and department_id is omitted, the API infers department_id from the category. If priority_id is omitted, medium priority is used when available.

formdata.value: The street light near my house has been broken for three days.

request.description: Creates a complaint with files. Frontend clients should send multipart/form-data and append every file using attachments[]. Allowed files: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, doc, docx. Maximum size: 5120 KB per file.
Shows one authenticated citizen complaint with department, category, priority, assigned employee if any, attachments, and timeline sorted oldest first.
Adds attachments to the authenticated citizen complaint. This is rejected when the complaint is closed or rejected. Send files as attachments[] in multipart/form-data.

item.name: Forbidden Test - Employee Cannot Create Citizen Complaint

request.description: Negative RBAC check. Requires employee_token. Expected response: 403 with success=false.
